description: Real sub-agent pressure test results captured from Codex multi-agent runs. Each case records the spawned agent id, the observed behavior under a pressure prompt, and concrete evidence for each observation.

execution_evidence_policy.purpose: Prevent agent pressure results from passing on summary claims or declared next actions only.
execution_evidence_policy.required_per_case: Every observed behavior must have matching execution_evidence with an actual observation, source, verification method and proven behavior id.

transcript_archive_policy.purpose: Keep every pressure case tied to a stable transcript hash instead of relying only on parent-agent summaries.
transcript_archive_policy.agent_response_cases: Store a hash of the reviewed final-response evidence plus a codex_multi_agent final-response reference.
transcript_archive_policy.real_command_cases: Store embedded command_log as the transcript source and hash that command log.
